document_name: Internal Volkswagen Audit of Type EA 189 Engine Emissions and Regulatory Non-Compliance

document_sentence_array.text: Volkswagen Group is currently one of the world's leading automobile manufacturers, with a strong focus on expanding its market share in the United States.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: The internal technical task force has confirmed that roughly 11 million vehicles worldwide are equipped with software that bypasses nitrogen oxide emission standards.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Diesel engines have traditionally been marketed to US consumers as a 'clean' and fuel-efficient alternative to gasoline-powered vehicles.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Legal consultants warn that a formal notice of violation from the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) could result in fines exceeding $18 billion.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Secret internal memos from the engineering department reveal the 'defeat device' was specifically designed to activate full emissions controls only during laboratory testing.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: The European automotive sector is under increasing pressure to meet stringent Euro 6 emissions targets by the end of the current fiscal year.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Board minutes from this morning indicate that CEO Martin Winterkorn has been briefed on the software's existence and the impossibility of a simple software fix.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Market analysts have recently noted that Volkswagen's 'Clean Diesel' marketing campaign has been a primary driver of its North American growth strategy.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Confidential financial provisions are being drafted to set aside an initial €6.5 billion to cover the anticipated costs of vehicle recalls and legal settlements.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Volkswagen shares are widely held by institutional investors and are a core component of the DAX index in Germany.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal correspondence between the US compliance office and Wolfsburg suggests that the EPA has already rejected the company's initial technical explanations.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Compliance is monitoring for unusual short-selling activity in VW preference shares ahead of the expected public admission on Friday.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: The automotive industry frequently collaborates on research regarding turbo-diesel injection systems and particulate filter longevity.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: A secret 'Stop Sale' order has been drafted for all 2.0-liter TDI models across US dealerships, effective immediately upon the EPA's public announcement.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Our research team is evaluating the potential impact of a massive recall on the residual values of used Volkswagen and Audi diesel vehicles.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Environmental groups have long advocated for real-world driving emissions tests to supplement static laboratory evaluations.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Private legal strategy documents discuss the probability of a criminal investigation by the US Department of Justice into the fraudulent emissions data.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: The company's credit rating may be placed on negative watch if the anticipated liabilities threaten its current liquidity position.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Global car sales for the first half of the year showed moderate growth in the SUV segment while sedan sales remained flat.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal memos indicate that the company is preparing for a complete management overhaul, including the potential resignation of several top-tier executives.
document_sentence_array.label: High
